frame_analyses.description: Initial view showing foam appendage with marking and pre-tied ligating loop visible in upper portion of field
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop appears properly positioned for deployment, foam appendage clearly marked

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instruments positioned appropriately for loop handling

frame_analyses.description: Right grasper manipulating loop while left assists, beginning to position loop around appendage

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate cinching technique, maintaining position at mark during tightening

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean cutting technique, appropriate length of tail being removed

penalties.description: Task completed beyond 180 second time limit

confidence_rationale: Clear view of loop placement and cinching. Time measurement based on visible timestamps. Loop positioning at mark well-observed, though exact mm measurements difficult from camera angle.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation from mark - appears to be at mark but precise measurement limited by camera resolution
technique_summary: Good technical execution with appropriate loop deployment and precise positioning. Primary issue was extended time beyond the 180-second limit, resulting in timeout penalty.
strengths: Excellent loop positioning at the marked line
Proper cinching technique with tight closure
improvement_suggestions: Focus on speed during loop placement phase to stay within time limit
Practice more efficient loop manipulation to reduce overall procedure time
